---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to diagnostics, UX, telemetry, or workflow.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem to solve

What user or developer problem should this feature improve?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the feature as clearly as you can.

## Why it matters

How would this improve the product, diagnostics quality, or developer trust?

## Scope

Choose one if helpful:

- UI/UX
- detector accuracy
- telemetry
- packaging/build
- documentation
- pro workflow

## Extra context

Anything else that would help shape the feature.
